recipes.title: Classic Tomato Eggs
recipes.description: A quick home-style dish with sweet and tangy flavor.
steps: Cut tomatoes and beat eggs with salt.
Scramble eggs in oil, then remove.
Stir-fry tomatoes, return eggs, season and serve.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
recipes.description: A nutritious breakfast ready in five minutes.
steps: Toast bread until golden.
Mash avocado with lemon and pepper.
Spread on toast and serve.

recipes.title: Iced Matcha Latte
recipes.description: Creamy cold green tea drink for a refreshing break.
steps: Whisk matcha with 2 tbsp warm water until smooth.
Fill a glass with ice and pour in milk.
Add matcha and honey, stir gently and serve.

recipes.title: Fresh Orange Juice
recipes.description: Simple pressed citrus drink with no added sugar.
steps: Roll oranges on the counter to loosen juice.
Cut in half and juice by hand or machine.
Serve immediately over ice if desired.

recipes.title: Berry Smoothie Bowl
recipes.description: Thick blended drink topped with fruit and granola.
steps: Blend banana, berries and yogurt until thick.
Pour into a bowl.
Top with granola and a drizzle of honey.

recipes.title: Stir-Fried Greens
recipes.description: Light vegetarian side that keeps vegetables crisp.
steps: Wash and cut vegetables.
Sauté garlic in oil.
Stir-fry vegetables 3 minutes, season and serve.

recipes.title: Chocolate Lava Cake
recipes.description: Warm dessert with a molten chocolate center.
steps: Melt chocolate and butter together.
Whisk eggs and sugar, fold in chocolate mix and flour.
Bake at 200°C for 12 minutes until edges set.

recipes.title: Honey Lemon Tea
recipes.description: Soothing hot drink for cold evenings.
steps: Slice lemon and add to a mug.
Pour hot water and stir in honey.
Steep 2 minutes before drinking.
